/usr/bin/c++  -stdlib=libc++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=11.0 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../../../../../../VST3/Release/legacy-midicc-out.vst3/Contents/MacOS/legacy-midicc-out "CMakeFiles/legacy-midicc-out.dir/source/plug.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/legacy-midicc-out.dir/source/plugcontroller.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/legacy-midicc-out.dir/source/plugentry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/legacy-midicc-out.dir/__/__/__/source/main/macmain.cpp.o"  -framework CoreFoundation ../../../../../../lib/Release/libsdk.a ../../../../../../lib/Release/libsdk_common.a ../../../../../../lib/Release/libbase.a ../../../../../../lib/Release/libpluginterfaces.a
